title: Form Update On
description: Type definition for when form validation and updates should be triggered. Determines the timing of form field validation and value updates.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: The AXFormUpdateOn type definition showing all available update triggers

props.name: AXFormUpdateOn
props.description: Union type defining when form validation and updates should be triggered. 'change' validates on every input change, 'blur' validates when the field loses focus, and 'submit' validates only when the form is submitted.
